events.name: New York Giants at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — Michael Penix Jr. felt a brief bit of apprehension as he ran down the tunnel, which was to be expected.
headlines.shortLinkText: Penix wins debut as Atlanta QB as Falcons return two picks for TDs, beat hapless Giants 34-7

headlines.description: — Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions locked in from the start and delivered a bounce-back performance. It came with a few team records, too.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes as Lions beat Bears 34-17 for franchise-record 13th win

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow and Ja'Marr Chase keep putting up extraordinary numbers, but the Cincinnati Bengals still need help to reach the playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow throws 3 TD passes and Bengals keep playoff hopes alive with 24-6 victory over Browns

headlines.description: — Jonathan Taylor took matters into his own hands Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jonathan Taylor rebounds with 218 yards, 3 TD runs as Colts hold off Titans 38-30

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Tyler Higbee waited nearly a year for this moment.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford's TD pass to Higbee after Rodgers' turnover leads Rams past Jets 19-9

headlines.description: — Jayden Daniels was not worried when he and the Washington Commanders trailed the Philadelphia Eagles by 14 points after just seven minutes, and the rookie quarterback was similarly undaunted staring down a 13-point deficit going into the fourth...
headlines.shortLinkText: Jayden Daniels throws for 5 TDs as the Commanders end the Eagles' winning streak at 10

headlines.description: — Sam Darnold has inspired confidence in his coach and teammates throughout this career-changing season. With the Vikings facing another late deficit, they had no doubt he'd deliver.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sam Darnold and Justin Jefferson lead surging Vikings past Seahawks 27-24

events.name: New England Patriots at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — With the Bills' attention and concern focused on the sideline, where trainers were examining quarterback Josh Allen’s throwing arm, cornerback Taron Johnson provided the necessary offense to lift Buffalo to 24-21 win over the New England Patriots on...
headlines.shortLinkText: James Cook scores 2 TDs and Bills force 3 turnovers in 24-21 win over Patriots

events.name: Jacksonville Jaguars at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Raiders owner Mark Davis made the rounds Sunday to congratulate the players as music blared inside the locker room.
headlines.shortLinkText: O'Connell passes for 257 yards and Raiders snap 10-game skid with 19-14 win over Jaguars

headlines.description: — The Miami Dolphins were not ready for their season to be over, even after a disappointing loss at Houston last week that narrowed their faint playoff hopes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins keep playoff hopes alive with 29-17 win over 49ers, who were eliminated before the game

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Dallas Cowboys

headlines.description: — Baker Mayfield came home to Texas looking to keep his Tampa Bay Buccaneers on track for the playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys beat Tampa Bay 26-24 as Baker Mayfield and the Bucs lose control of their playoff fate
